sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35086" key="e)/nda|dos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔνδᾱδ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">δάς</etym>) <sense id="n35086.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">resinous, full of resin</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:3:9:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.9.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
